overall.description: A first-person walk through the Del Perro Pier in GTA V during a vibrant purple and orange sunset. The camera moves from the wooden parking lot, through the neon-lit entrance arch, along the amusement park boardwalk with roller coaster and Ferris wheel, and finally along the waterfront side of the pier with ocean views.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden parking lot approaching amusement pier

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wooden parking deck toward the amusement park structures in the distance

entered.detail: expansive wooden plank surface with white painted parking lines
large steel roller coaster with illuminated tracks visible against the sunset sky
ornate black street lamp with multiple spherical lights
long low building with multiple windows running along the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide wooden parking deck with white painted lines, facing the distant Del Perro Pier amusement structures. The camera walks steadily forward as the sun sets, casting warm pink and orange hues across the sky. A vintage street lamp passes by on the left while the roller coaster structure grows larger in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement park entrance with neon signage

events.description: camera turns right toward the Del Perro Pier entrance arch
passing under the illuminated Del Perro Pier archway with neon surfboard decorations

agents.ego_description: turning right and approaching the neon-lit pier entrance arch with increasing pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: walking toward the pier entrance ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large neon-lit entrance arch with purple surfboard decorations and 'Los Santos Del Perro Pier' signage
large illuminated Ferris wheel with colorful lights visible through the archway
overhead string lights spanning across the pier entrance
row of wooden shop stalls with striped awnings on the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right toward the pier entrance, revealing the iconic Del Perro Pier arch with vibrant purple neon lights. The Ferris wheel becomes visible through the arch as the camera approaches. Passing under the archway marks the transition from the open parking lot to the amusement park interior, with wooden shops lining the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered boardwalk under roller coaster tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the main pier boardwalk passing under the roller coaster structure and alongside various shops

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction along the boardwalk wearing casual summer clothing

entered.detail: row of wooden shop stalls and buildings on the right side of the walkway
blue metal trash can on the right side of the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the main pier boardwalk under the roller coaster tracks, with the Ferris wheel visible in the distance to the left. The walkway is lined with wooden shops on both sides and overhead string lights. The camera passes a pedestrian and continues forward as the roller coaster structure looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with ocean view

events.description: camera turns right to follow the waterfront path along the pier edge
ocean view becomes visible on the right side with sunset reflection on water

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront side of the pier with the ocean visible to the right, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead along the waterfront path

entered.detail: open ocean horizon with pink and purple sunset reflection on the water surface
buildings with distinctive wavy metal roofs and chain-link fencing on the right side
wooden planter benches lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto the waterfront promenade, revealing a stunning ocean view with the sunset reflecting on the water. The Ferris wheel and roller coaster disappear from view as the path follows the pier's edge. Street lamps illuminate the wooden walkway while distant pedestrians walk ahead, and the sky transitions to deeper purple hues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open wooden parking area into the neon-lit heart of an amusement pier, eventually ending at the serene ocean's edge. It begins on a wide parking deck under a pink and orange sunset, moving steadily forward past a vintage street lamp as the distant roller coaster structure grows larger. As the camera turns right, it passes under the vibrant purple neon arch of the Del Perro Pier entrance, transitioning from the open lot into a bustling boardwalk lined with wooden shops. The scene then shifts beneath the looming tracks of the roller coaster and overhead string lights before turning right onto the waterfront promenade. Finally, the amusement structures fade from view as the camera follows the pier's edge, revealing the sunset reflecting on the water under a deepening purple sky.
